purpose: Fresh live browser traversal for RISK-AGENT-REAL-LLM-SSE using Chrome, Next web on 3108, API on 4108, and OpenRouter provider.
secretsPolicy: OpenRouter secret was loaded from ignored env and is not written to evidence.

environment.browser: Installed Google Chrome via Playwright channel=chrome

preFixFinding.actualBefore: Live model verbally asked to confirm two create_task actions, but no review controls or structured proposedActions appeared in the UI.
preFixFinding.risk: Fake action confirmation: user sees a confirmation request, but there is no actionable/rejectable/applicable proposal.

fixes.change: Normalizes unstructured action-confirmation text to a safe fallback when proposedActions is empty.
Strengthens the server prompt: actions must be proposed through mutation tools, not text-only confirmation.
Makes title-only create_task agent actions executable by adding plannedStart/plannedFinish/plannedWork/duration/participants defaults and documenting optional schema fields.

browserEvidence.name: initial live stream rendering
browserEvidence.result: UI rendered the live OpenRouter answer and did not show demo/mock text.

browserEvidence.name: structured proposal after guard
browserEvidence.result: UI showed a review panel with two structured create_task actions and reject/apply controls.

browserEvidence.name: reject one, apply one, readback
browserEvidence.result: Reject/apply UX and backend readback passed: only the selected create_task action was applied.

verification: live Chrome/Playwright browser smoke on /agent -> pass
knownTestHarnessIssue: apps/api/src/agent/agentExecute.test.ts currently fails in its auth harness with 401/undefined results before the changed create_task branch; it was not used as pass evidence for this slice.

coverageImpact.RISK-AGENT-REAL-LLM-SSE: Covers live browser stream rendering, structured proposal rendering, reject/apply UX, /execute success, and data readback for create_task with OpenRouter. Remaining agent risk is limited to broader per-role/provider variants and other action tools, not the core live SSE/apply path.
